stemHtml: What is correct regarding an Enhanced Visual System (EVS)?

options.a: It combines the static data from a database with the actual data from external sensors to create a visual 3-dimensional (3D) representation of the surroundings of the aircraft.
options.b: It collects and stores real-time data from external sensors to create a synthetic vision representation of the surroundings of the aircraft.
options.c: It generates real-time imagery of the surroundings of the aircraft and it is able to digitally detect objects like obstacles to warn the crew.
options.d: It generates real-time imagery, to display on the PFD or HUD, of the surroundings of the aircraft based on external sensors.
